functions.title: Guide Book #8

§7Guide Book #8§r
§lWandering Collectors§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Neutral
•§lMob type§r: Villager, Trader, Humanoid.
•§lSpawn in§r: All overworld surfaces.
•§lHealth§r: 26

•§lWalk speed§r: 0.3
•§lBreathe in§r: Air.
•§lPossible drops§r: Emerald Powder, Leather Scrap, Mud Ball, XP Orbs.
•§lAvoids§r: Monsters, Sculk blocks.
•§lRange Attack§r: Mud Ball
•§lProjectile damage§r: 2
•Can trade with players.

•Each trader variation had a different type of trade table.
•They can change their trade table every 3 days in game.
